repo.name: zod-crud-monorepo
repo.summary:
zod-crud는 Zod schema가 있는 JSON 문서를 편집하기 위한 headless document
engine입니다.

packages.name: @zod-crud/bulk-edit
packages.description: Official JSONPath bulk editing extension functions for zod-crud documents.
packages.summary: Official headless JSONPath bulk editing extension for `zod-crud` documents.

guidance.useFor: apply JSONPath replace/delete operations to many document positions
guidance.notFor: rendered text search UI or product workflow approval

packages.name: @zod-crud/clipboard-web
packages.description: Web clipboard extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: bridge zod-crud clipboard payloads to the browser clipboard
guidance.notFor: TSV/CSV spreadsheet paste engines

packages.name: @zod-crud/collection
packages.description: Official collection editing extension functions for ordered JSON array item commands in zod-crud documents.
packages.summary: Official headless collection editing extension for `zod-crud` documents.

guidance.useFor: edit ordered JSON arrays with item-level commands
guidance.notFor: database collections or rendered list UI

packages.name: @zod-crud/comments
packages.description: Official comments extension functions for review notes anchored to zod-crud documents.
packages.summary:
Official headless comments extension for review notes anchored to `zod-crud`
documents.

guidance.useFor: anchor review comments to document structure
guidance.notFor: comment UI, moderation, or author storage

packages.name: @zod-crud/dirty-state
packages.description: Official dirty state tracking extension functions for zod-crud documents.
packages.summary: Official headless dirty state tracking extension for `zod-crud` documents.

guidance.useFor: compare a document to a clean baseline
guidance.notFor: persistence or server save status

packages.name: @zod-crud/form-draft
packages.description: Official form draft extension functions for temporary invalid input before committing valid zod-crud JSON.
packages.summary:
Official headless form draft extension for temporary input that is not ready to
enter a schema-valid `zod-crud` document.

guidance.useFor: hold temporary invalid form input before committing valid JSON
guidance.notFor: rendered form components

packages.name: @zod-crud/id-resolver
packages.description: Official stable id resolver extension functions for locating zod-crud document nodes by scope and id.
packages.summary: Official headless stable id resolver extension for `zod-crud` documents.

guidance.useFor: resolve scoped stable ids to current JSON Pointers
guidance.notFor: id generation, relation graphs, routing, or server identity

packages.name: @zod-crud/outline
packages.description: Official outline tree and structure editing extension functions for zod-crud documents.
packages.summary:
Official headless outline tree and structure editing extension for `zod-crud`
documents.

guidance.useFor: project and edit nested document outline structures
guidance.notFor: Figma layer panels without a tree schema adapter

packages.name: @zod-crud/patch-log
packages.description: Official patch log and replay extension functions for zod-crud documents.
packages.summary:
Official headless patch recording and replay extension for `zod-crud`
documents.

guidance.useFor: record and replay applied JSON Patch records
guidance.notFor: product activity feeds or audit authorization

packages.name: @zod-crud/patch-preview
packages.description: Official patch preview extension functions for dry-running zod-crud document patches.
packages.summary: Official headless patch preview extension for `zod-crud` documents.

guidance.useFor: preview patch effects before confirmation
guidance.notFor: visual diff rendering

packages.name: @zod-crud/persist-web
packages.description: Official web persistence extension functions for zod-crud documents.
packages.summary: Official headless web persistence extension for `zod-crud` documents.

guidance.useFor: save and restore documents in browser storage-like hosts
guidance.notFor: server sync, auth, or conflict resolution

packages.name: @zod-crud/proposed-changes
packages.description: Official proposed document change review extension functions for zod-crud documents.
packages.summary:
Official headless proposed document change review extension for `zod-crud`
documents.

guidance.useFor: review, accept, or reject proposed document patches
guidance.notFor: slash commands or mention autocomplete

packages.name: @zod-crud/protected-ranges
packages.description: Official protected range guard extension functions for zod-crud documents.
packages.summary: Official headless protected range guard extension for `zod-crud` documents.

guidance.useFor: guard edits to protected JSON Pointer ranges
guidance.notFor: 2D spreadsheet selection UI or server authorization

packages.name: @zod-crud/schema-form
packages.description: Official schema-backed field descriptor extension functions for zod-crud documents; no rendered form UI.
packages.summary:
Official headless schema-backed field descriptor extension for `zod-crud`
documents.

guidance.useFor: derive schema-backed field descriptors
guidance.notFor: form rendering or input widgets

packages.name: @zod-crud/search-replace
packages.description: Official search and replace extension functions for text fields in zod-crud documents.
packages.summary:
Official headless search and replace extension for text fields in `zod-crud`
documents.

guidance.useFor: find and replace text across document string fields
guidance.notFor: regex engines, rendered text extraction, or search UI

packages.name: @zod-crud/snippets
packages.description: Official snippet insertion extension functions for reusable JSON payloads in zod-crud documents.
packages.summary: Official headless snippet insertion extension for `zod-crud` documents.

guidance.useFor: insert reusable JSON payloads with schema-safe paste checks
guidance.notFor: slash palette UI or snippet storage

packages.name: zod-crud
packages.description: Headless JSON editing primitives guarded by Zod schemas.
packages.summary:
zod-crud는 Zod schema가 있는 JSON 문서를 편집하기 위한 headless document
engine입니다.

guidance.notFor: rendered text search UI or product workflow approval

guidance.notFor: TSV/CSV spreadsheet paste engines

officialExtensions.summary: Official headless collection editing extension for `zod-crud` documents.

officialExtensions.description: Official patch preview extension functions for dry-running zod-crud document patches.
officialExtensions.summary: Official headless patch preview extension for `zod-crud` documents.

guidance.useFor: preview patch effects before confirmation
guidance.notFor: visual diff rendering

officialExtensions.name: @zod-crud/persist-web
officialExtensions.description: Official web persistence extension functions for zod-crud documents.
officialExtensions.summary: Official headless web persistence extension for `zod-crud` documents.

guidance.useFor: save and restore documents in browser storage-like hosts
guidance.notFor: server sync, auth, or conflict resolution

officialExtensions.name: @zod-crud/proposed-changes
officialExtensions.description: Official proposed document change review extension functions for zod-crud documents.
officialExtensions.summary:
Official headless proposed document change review extension for `zod-crud`
documents.

guidance.useFor: review, accept, or reject proposed document patches
guidance.notFor: slash commands or mention autocomplete

officialExtensions.name: @zod-crud/protected-ranges
officialExtensions.description: Official protected range guard extension functions for zod-crud documents.
officialExtensions.summary: Official headless protected range guard extension for `zod-crud` documents.

guidance.useFor: guard edits to protected JSON Pointer ranges
guidance.notFor: 2D spreadsheet selection UI or server authorization

officialExtensions.name: @zod-crud/schema-form
officialExtensions.description: Official schema-backed field descriptor extension functions for zod-crud documents; no rendered form UI.
officialExtensions.summary:
Official headless schema-backed field descriptor extension for `zod-crud`
documents.

guidance.useFor: derive schema-backed field descriptors
guidance.notFor: form rendering or input widgets

officialExtensions.name: @zod-crud/search-replace
officialExtensions.description: Official search and replace extension functions for text fields in zod-crud documents.
officialExtensions.summary:
Official headless search and replace extension for text fields in `zod-crud`
documents.

guidance.useFor: find and replace text across document string fields
guidance.notFor: regex engines, rendered text extraction, or search UI

officialExtensions.name: @zod-crud/snippets
officialExtensions.description: Official snippet insertion extension functions for reusable JSON payloads in zod-crud documents.
officialExtensions.summary: Official headless snippet insertion extension for `zod-crud` documents.

guidance.useFor: insert reusable JSON payloads with schema-safe paste checks
guidance.notFor: slash palette UI or snippet storage

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/apply-defaults
labExtensions.description: Lab apply-defaults (add missing object keys from defaults) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: add missing object keys from a defaults map without overwriting existing ones
guidance.notFor: filling existing empty values, removing unknown keys, or deep merge

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/autosave
labExtensions.description: Lab autosave orchestration extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: schedule host-owned saves after document changes
guidance.notFor: retry queues, offline sync, or server conflict resolution

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/batch-update
labExtensions.description: Lab batch-update (set a field across selected items) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: set a field across a list of selected item pointers to a constant or computed value
guidance.notFor: selecting which items to edit, or JSONPath query-driven replacement

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/bookmarks
labExtensions.description: Lab bookmark tracking extension functions for zod-crud documents.
labExtensions.summary: Headless bookmark tracking extension for `zod-crud` documents.

guidance.useFor: keep named JSON Pointer locations stable across edits
guidance.notFor: browser bookmarks or route state

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/calculated-fields
labExtensions.description: Lab calculated-fields (sync host-calculated fields) extension functions for zod-crud documents.
labExtensions.summary: Lab calculated field extension for `zod-crud` documents.

guidance.useFor: sync host-computed derived JSON fields
guidance.notFor: formula languages or dependency runtimes

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/change-case
labExtensions.description: Lab change-case (case/whitespace transforms on a string field) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: apply case/whitespace transforms (upper, lower, trim, title) to a string field
guidance.notFor: locale-aware casing, rich text formatting toolbars, or find/replace

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/checkpoints
labExtensions.description: Lab checkpoint snapshot extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: name and restore document snapshots
guidance.notFor: durable version graphs or cloud backup

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/clear-contents
labExtensions.description: Lab clear-contents (reset fields to schema-derived empties) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: reset selected fields to schema-derived empty values, keeping structure
guidance.notFor: structural delete, caller-supplied bulk replace, or enum/object default policy

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/convert-block-type
labExtensions.description: Lab block type conversion extension functions for zod-crud documents.
labExtensions.summary:
Lab extension for converting a JSON block/object from one host-described type to
another.

guidance.useFor: convert selected nodes between host-described kinds
guidance.notFor: schema migration systems

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/convert-type
labExtensions.description: Lab convert-type (convert a field type: string/number/boolean) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: convert a field type (string/number/integer/boolean) where the schema permits it
guidance.notFor: locale/format-aware parsing of currency or dates, or input masks

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/dedupe
labExtensions.description: Lab dedupe (remove duplicate array items) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: remove duplicate array items by whole value or a host key
guidance.notFor: fuzzy matching, cross-array dedupe, or JSONPath match deletion

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/document-diff
labExtensions.description: Lab document diff and apply extension functions for zod-crud documents.
labExtensions.summary: Lab document diff and apply extension for `zod-crud` documents.

guidance.useFor: produce and apply patch changes toward a target document
guidance.notFor: visual diff UI or merge conflict resolution

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/drag-drop
labExtensions.description: Lab drag and drop extension functions for zod-crud documents.
labExtensions.summary: Lab drag and drop extension for `zod-crud` documents.

guidance.useFor: turn drag/drop intent into move or paste operations
guidance.notFor: DOM drag/drop events, hit testing, or hover UI

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/fill-blanks
labExtensions.description: Lab fill-blanks (fill only empty slots) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: fill only empty slots across targets, preserving non-empty values
guidance.notFor: adding missing fields, choosing targets, or unconditional batch set

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/fill-down
labExtensions.description: Lab fill-down (carry last non-empty value into blanks) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: carry the last non-empty value into the empty slots that follow (ffill)
guidance.notFor: constant fill, numeric series interpolation, or rendered grid UI

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/fill-series
labExtensions.description: Lab fill/series propagation extension functions for zod-crud documents.
labExtensions.summary: Lab fill/series propagation extension for `zod-crud` documents.

guidance.useFor: fill a value or linear series across a contiguous sibling range
guidance.notFor: date/pattern series, 2D grid fill, or fill-handle drag UI

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/generate-slug
labExtensions.description: Lab generate-slug (derive a URL-safe slug from a string) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: derive a URL-safe slug from a string field (CMS title to slug)
guidance.notFor: uniqueness/collision handling or non-Latin transliteration

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/grid-range
labExtensions.description: Lab grid-range editing extension functions for sparse-record-backed zod-crud documents.
labExtensions.summary: Lab grid-range editing extension for sparse-record-backed `zod-crud` documents.

guidance.useFor: paste or fill rectangular grid ranges backed by sparse JSON records
guidance.notFor: DOM grid selection, coordinate naming policy, formulas, or TSV/CSV parsing

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/grouping
labExtensions.description: Lab structural group and ungroup extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: group and ungroup selected sibling JSON items
guidance.notFor: Airtable group-by views

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/increment-number
labExtensions.description: Lab increment-number (increment/decrement a numeric field) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: increment, decrement, or step a numeric field with optional clamping
guidance.notFor: rendered spinners, formatting, units, or currency

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/join-text
labExtensions.description: Lab join-text (join an array into a string field) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: join an array into a string field with a separator (inverse of split-text)
guidance.notFor: locale list formatting, or reading the result without writing

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/layer-order
labExtensions.description: Lab layer ordering extension functions for zod-crud documents.
labExtensions.summary: Lab layer ordering extension for `zod-crud` documents.

guidance.useFor: reorder visual stack arrays with bring/send commands
guidance.notFor: canvas rendering or z-index CSS management

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/limit-items
labExtensions.description: Lab limit-items (cap an array to N items) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: cap a JSON array to at most N items, keeping the start or end
guidance.notFor: choosing survivors beyond start/end, or auto-trimming on insert

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/live-cursors
labExtensions.description: Lab live-cursors (track remote collaborator cursors) extension functions for zod-crud documents.
labExtensions.summary: Lab package for remote collaborator cursor and selection presence.

guidance.useFor: track remote collaborator cursors and selections
guidance.notFor: CRDT/OT or realtime transport

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/move-selected
labExtensions.description: Lab move-selected (move a contiguous selected block) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: move a contiguous selection of sibling items to a new position
guidance.notFor: single-item moves, drag/drop events, or cross-array moves

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/pad-text
labExtensions.description: Lab pad-text (pad a string to a minimum length) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: pad a string field to a minimum length (zero-padded codes/IDs)
guidance.notFor: number formatting or display-time alignment

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/paste-cells
labExtensions.description: Lab paste-cells (2D matrix into rectangular cells) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: paste a 2D value matrix onto a rectangular array-of-records region
guidance.notFor: TSV/CSV parsing, clipboard I/O, or auto-growing the array

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/paste-special
labExtensions.description: Lab paste special extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: adapt external payloads before schema-safe paste
guidance.notFor: browser clipboard I/O or autocomplete dropdowns

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/references
labExtensions.description: Lab stable reference and backlink extension functions for zod-crud documents.
labExtensions.summary: Lab extension for stable references and backlinks over JSON documents.

guidance.useFor: track stable references and backlinks over JSON documents
guidance.notFor: route state or rendered links

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/renumber-items
labExtensions.description: Lab renumber-items (sync an order field to array position) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: sync an order/position field to each item array position after a reorder
guidance.notFor: reordering the array itself, or fractional/gap indexing

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/round
labExtensions.description: Lab round (round/floor/ceil a number) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: round a number to a precision or nearest step (round/floor/ceil/trunc)
guidance.notFor: currency/locale formatting, or increment/clamp (see increment-number)

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/sort-items
labExtensions.description: Lab sort-items (sort/reverse array items) extension functions for zod-crud documents.
labExtensions.summary: Lab collection sort extension for `zod-crud` documents.

guidance.useFor: sort or reverse JSON array items
guidance.notFor: query views, filters, or server sorting

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/sparse-record
labExtensions.description: Lab sparse-record entry editing extension functions for zod-crud documents.
labExtensions.summary: Lab sparse-record entry editing extension for `zod-crud` documents.

guidance.useFor: set or remove keyed entries in sparse JSON records with add/replace/remove/no-op planning
guidance.notFor: 2D grid coordinate expansion, product key normalization, or rendered selection

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/split-text
labExtensions.description: Lab split-text (split a string into array items) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: split a string into array items by a delimiter (tag input, paste-as-list)
guidance.notFor: CSV/TSV quoting, split-to-columns, or clipboard access

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/swap-items
labExtensions.description: Lab swap-items (exchange two array items) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: exchange the positions of two items in the same array
guidance.notFor: cross-array swaps or moving to an arbitrary index

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/toggle-option
labExtensions.description: Lab toggle-option (toggle a value in an array set) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: toggle, add, or remove a value's presence in a JSON array (tag/multi-select)
guidance.notFor: ordered insertion position or deduping an existing array

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/toggle-value
labExtensions.description: Lab toggle-value (toggle/advance a field through values) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: toggle a boolean or advance an enum/value field (enum options come from the schema)
guidance.notFor: rendered toggle controls or keyboard policy

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/trim-text
labExtensions.description: Lab trim-text (cap a string to a max length) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: cap a string field to a max length with optional ellipsis and word boundary
guidance.notFor: display-time CSS truncation or grapheme/locale-aware length

labExtensions.name: @zod-crud/wrap-selection
labExtensions.description: Lab wrap-selection (wrap/unwrap selected items) extension functions for zod-crud documents.

guidance.useFor: wrap sibling JSON items in host-defined containers
guidance.notFor: visual grouping or layout containers

apps.name: @zod-crud/copy-review-lab
apps.summary: Dogfoods `@zod-crud/search-replace` as a copy cleanup product surface.

apps.name: @zod-crud/grouping-lab
apps.summary: Dogfoods `@zod-crud/grouping` as a small structural editor feature.

apps.name: @zod-crud/proposed-changes-lab
apps.summary: Dogfoods `@zod-crud/proposed-changes` as a small proposed document change review feature.

apps.name: @zod-crud/protected-ranges-lab
apps.summary: Dogfoods official `@zod-crud/protected-ranges` as a locked structured content editor.

apps.name: @zod-crud/review-comments-lab
apps.summary: Dogfoods `@zod-crud/comments` as an editorial review product surface.

apps.name: @zod-crud/snippet-composer-lab
apps.summary: Dogfoods official `@zod-crud/snippets` as a page block composer.
